variants: Keiko Misono passionately contributes to her community as a caretaker for Cloverhaven Haven, where she provides support to residents in need. Her commitment to both her career and her volunteer efforts showcases her dedication to service.

Alongside her position at the institute, Keiko plays an active role as a caretaker for Cloverhaven Haven, fulfilling her desire to give back to the community.
